reason: Remove the eager WebExtension list query from delegate assignment while Gecko's privileged JS global is still initializing.
Treat an absent transient PiP candidate as unavailable instead of terminating the app.
Reject malformed Gecko event payloads without a forced-cast crash.
Make private selector integration conditional for iOS 15 and runtime API variation.
Add Vulpra tracking-protection settings and make repeated open or delayed engine-view creation recoverable.
Expose the Vulpra-owned tracking-protection flag to Gecko session creation.
Use the retained Utils contract instead of the missing TSUtils compatibility header.
Reject duplicate engine-view attachment without a process-terminating trap.
Remove development get-task-allow from the standard Helper entitlement profile.
Provide complete build-owned bundle metadata required for an embedded app extension.
Verify runtime inputs, use repository-canonical paths, and require an actual signing identity when signing is enabled.
Build the Gecko device runtime for the Vulpra iOS 15 minimum.
Keep target-scoped idevice FFI output under .build and support both the arm64 device and arm64 Simulator producers at the canonical iOS deployment target.
Bind reusable runtime artifacts to Xcode and SDK build fingerprints and required public headers.
Test runtime fingerprint invalidation, header closure, and stale manifest rejection.
